ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "call_received_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the call was received */,
  "report_number" INTEGER /* Report number assigned to the event */,
  "nature_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nature code categorizing the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "call_received_method" INTEGER /* Method through which the call was received (e.g., SELF, PHONE) */,
  "closing_disposition" INTEGER /* Dispositional status of the incident (e.g., CIT, RPT, WAR) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who initially logged the incident */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_call_received_method FOREIGN KEY ("call_received_method") REFERENCES call_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_nature_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("nature_code_id") REFERENCES nature_codes ("nature_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_closing_disposition FOREIGN KEY ("closing_disposition") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nature_codes" (
  "nature_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nature code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nature code (e.g., TRAFFIC STOP / ENFORCEMENT) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the nature code (e.g., Traffic, Criminal, Emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nature_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the call method (e.g., SELF, PHONE) */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of call method (e.g., Phone, Online, In-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "disposition_description" TEXT /* Description of the disposition (e.g., CIT, RPT, WAR) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the disposition (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Initial, Follow-up, Final) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who created the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to (e.g., Patrol, Investigations) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being assigned */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer assigned to the incident */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_assignments_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_assignments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_logs" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the call was made */,
  "caller_name" TEXT /* Name of the person making the call */,
  "caller_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the caller */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., Emergency, Non-emergency) */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in minutes */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who handled the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_logs_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident status (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the status update */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status update (e.g., Initial, Progress, Closure) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the status update */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_status_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_status_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)
